title: Akamai Guardicore Deception Asset Interaction Alerts (`guardicore:deception`)
spl:
index=microseg sourcetype="guardicore:deception" earliest=-7d
| stats count by decoy_name, src_ip, attack_stage
| sort -count
description: Any touch of a decoy is high-fidelity malicious activity with near-zero benign noise.
value: SOC elevates to full incident on first connection.
implementation: Install the add-on, configure API polling intervals appropriate to API limits, and map assets to CMDB for enrichment lookups.

references.title: Splunkbase — Akamai Guardicore Add-on for Splunk

grandmaExplanation: We watch Guardicore data to spot unsafe inside-the-network traffic and policy gaps before attackers pivot far.
